calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue [Ccp 397(C)];
Off Calendar Jul-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lee B. Madinger, Esq. of Fullerton Lemann Schaefer & Dominick, LLP, Tel. 909.889.3691, for defendant, via Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT R.J.D. INSURANCE SALES, INC.'S Motion For Change Of Venue [CCP 397(C)] is granted. Defendant sufficiently demonstrates that the convenience of witnesses and ends of justice warrant transferring this action to San Bernardino County. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue [Ccp 397(C)];
